faqs.question: Do you offer a free trial class?
faqs.answer: Yes — two free trial sessions, no card and no commitment. Just gloves, a coach, and the truth about how much you've got. Register now → or book on WhatsApp →

faqs.question: What are your training timings?
faqs.answer: Morning sessions run 6:00 AM – 10:00 AM and evening sessions run 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM, every day. The 5:00 PM evening slot is kids-only; adults train from 6:00 PM.

faqs.question: Do I need any boxing experience to join?
faqs.answer: None at all. We train complete beginners through to competitive fighters. Our coaches tailor sessions to your level — as one member put it, "they always go out of the way to recognise what you lack and how to develop what you're missing."

faqs.question: Do you train kids?
faqs.answer: Yes. There's a dedicated kids-only session at 5:00 PM every evening, coached separately from the adult classes.

faqs.question: Is White Corner Boxing Academy officially affiliated?
faqs.answer: Yes — we are proudly affiliated with the Karnataka Amateur Boxing Association (KABA), which means our fighters can compete in sanctioned amateur boxing competitions.
